purpose: Outfit Of The Day full-body shot showcasing complete modest look — Saudi-market styling, full-length to show head-to-toe coordination.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: OOTD outfit of the day full-body fashion photography, Saudi female model wearing complete modest outfit — {outfit_descriptor} including abaya or modest dress, coordinated hijab, footwear visible at bottom, {accessory_highlights}, full-length head-to-toe composition showing entire look, {setting_descriptor} background — neutral studio / architectural exterior / lifestyle setting, confident relaxed posture, face visible from side or three-quarter with perfect hijab coverage, natural authentic expression, professional fashion lighting, hyper-realistic fabric texture and clothing detail, shot on 85mm at f/4 full-body framing, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: tight or form-fitting clothing
Avoid in output: exposed skin beyond face and hands
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Saudi adaptation guidance: OOTD is the highest-frequency content type for Saudi fashion brands. Full-length 4:5 format maximizes screen real estate on Instagram feed. Hijab coverage must be complete and correctly rendered. Model posture should be confident, not provocative. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 3-5 per week for fashion brands. Compliance level: elevated.
